name: Sweet Yogurt Dressing (Lf)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Chopped nuts; (walnuts, pecans, or other)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix together the plain yogurt and raisins.
2. Add the chopped nuts to the mixture and stir until combined.
3. Stir in the honey until well mixed.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
5. Serve cold. Makes about 1.5 cups.
